meta.name: DAO Governance Agent
meta.description: Autonomous voting delegate with strict governance-only permissions. Can vote, create proposals, and manage delegation — cannot move funds. The agent acts as a trusted on-chain steward with zero treasury access.
meta.useCase: AI delegate that votes according to stated principles, explains reasoning publicly (Venice), logs every vote with rationale

identity.description: On-chain AI delegate — votes according to stated principles, reasoning logged

native.note: Gas only — agent cannot move meaningful ETH under any circumstances

allowed.name: Compound Governor Bravo
allowed.description: DAO governance contract — voting and proposal creation only

allowed.name: Optimism Governor
allowed.description: Optimism DAO governance on OP Mainnet

allowed.name: castVoteWithReason(uint256,uint8,string)
allowed.description: Vote with public reasoning — preferred method for accountability

blocked.name: approve(address,uint256)
blocked.reason: Token approvals not permitted — governance delegate has no treasury mandate

blocked.name: transfer(address,uint256)
blocked.reason: Fund transfers not permitted under any circumstances

useCases: DAO member who wants AI to vote on their behalf according to stated principles (e.g., 'prioritize decentralization, vote no on treasury grants > $500k without milestones')
Multi-DAO delegate — same agent covers 10 DAOs, human sets principles once
Composable with Ghost Protocol: Venice provides confidential reasoning, AgentScope blocks any non-governance transaction, on-chain log proves the agent voted correctly
